signIn.title: Welcome to Varde
signIn.description: One last step before the dashboard.
signIn.stepExplainer: The bot itself is ready to connect to Discord with its token. We just need to identify you so the dashboard knows which servers you administer and can let you invite the bot there.
signIn.accountDistinction: Right now, you sign in with your everyday human Discord account. This has nothing to do with the bot account whose token you set up earlier.

redirectHint.heading: Getting "redirect_uri OAuth2 invalid" when you click?
redirectHint.cause: Discord refuses OAuth as long as the redirect URI sent by the dashboard isn't registered in your Discord application.
redirectHint.instruction: In the portal: your app → OAuth2 → General → Redirects → paste → Save Changes. Then come back here and retry.

form.label: {moduleName} configuration
form.title: General configuration
form.fieldErrorsHint: Some fields are invalid, see the messages above.

moduleConfig.noConfigDescription: This module does not expose a configuration schema. Nothing to tune here.

infoCard.title: Information
infoCard.toggleNote: Disabling a module immediately stops its event and command handlers for this server. The config is preserved — re-enabling restores everything.

modulesGrid.title: Modules
modulesGrid.description: Enable, configure, and pin the modules available on this server.
modulesGrid.emptyAll: No module is loaded on this instance.

toast.maxPinsDescription: You already have 8 modules pinned. Unpin one before adding another.

pinned.title: Pinned modules
pinned.emptyDescription: No module pinned yet. Pin the modules you configure most often to keep them one click away.

recentChanges.title: Recently modified
recentChanges.empty: No module modified in the last 30 days.

recentActivity.title: Bot activity (24h)
recentActivity.empty: No activity recorded over the last 24 hours.

empty.title: No server
empty.descriptionLine1: The Varde bot is not on any of your manageable servers yet. Invite it now to start configuring it.
empty.inviteButton: Invite the bot to a server
empty.descriptionLine2: Once the bot is added to a server, switch back to this tab — you'll be redirected automatically to the server's dashboard.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The requested page does not exist, or you do not have access to it.

welcome.title: Welcome to Varde
welcome.subtitle: Let's get your instance up and running in a few minutes.
welcome.intro: This wizard will hook up your Discord bot and bring the dashboard online. Plan for about 10 minutes — you can leave and come back, the wizard resumes at the last validated step.
welcome.needsItem1: A Discord account with access to the Developer portal (https://discord.com/developers).
welcome.needsItem2: A Discord server to test the bot (a dedicated test server is recommended).
welcome.localModeNote: Varde runs locally by default. To let other administrators reach the dashboard, you'll be able to configure a shared access URL later.

systemCheck.title: System check
systemCheck.subtitle: We verify that your instance can reach its database, encrypt secrets, and talk to Discord.
systemCheck.apiUnreachable: The wizard API is unreachable. Make sure the server process is running (apps/server) and reload the page.

baseUrl.label: Dashboard access URL
baseUrl.hint: This is the address your administrators will type in their browser. You'll be able to change it later from the instance administration page.

discordApp.title: Create the Discord application
discordApp.subtitle: Create an application in Discord's Developer portal, then paste its Application ID and Public Key.

steps.openPortal: Open <link>the Discord Developer portal</link> in a new tab.
steps.createApp: Click "New Application" and give it a name (you can change it later).
steps.copyAppId: Under "General Information" → copy the Application ID.
steps.copyPublicKey: Still in "General Information" → copy the Public Key.

appId.label: Application ID
appId.formatError: The Application ID must be 17 to 20 digits.

publicKey.label: Public Key
publicKey.formatError: The public key must be 64 hexadecimal characters (0-9, a-f).

errors.invalidBody: Application ID or Public Key is malformed. Verify the values shown by Discord.
errors.notFound: No Discord application found for this Application ID. Double-check the value in the Developer portal.
errors.unreachable: Discord is unreachable. Try again in a moment.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred on the API side.

botToken.title: Bot token and intents
botToken.subtitle: The bot needs a token and the three privileged intents enabled in the Developer portal.

steps.openBotTab: In your application, open the "Bot" tab.
steps.resetToken: Click "Reset Token" and copy the value immediately (Discord will not show it again).
steps.enableIntents: Enable the three Privileged Gateway Intents (Presence, Server Members, Message Content).

savedBanner.label: The bot token is saved and encrypted at rest.

token.label: Bot token
token.hint: Never share this token. It is encrypted at rest with your master key.
token.formatError: The token looks too short. Check that you pasted the full value from the Developer portal.

botToken.invalidToken: Token rejected by Discord. Generate a fresh one in the Developer portal and try again.

intents.heading: Privileged intents
intents.missing: Enable the missing intents in the Developer portal then re-validate. You can also continue — some modules work without them, but the related features will be disabled.

errors.unreachable: Discord is unreachable. Try again in a moment.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred on the API side.

oauth.title: OAuth for the dashboard
oauth.subtitle: We configure Discord login for your dashboard administrators.

steps.openOAuthTab: In your Discord application, open the "OAuth2 → General" tab.
steps.pasteRedirect: Under "Redirects", add the URL below then click "Save Changes".
steps.copySecret: Still in "OAuth2 → General", click "Reset Secret" and copy the value (Discord will not show it again).

redirect.label: Redirect URI to paste into Discord
redirect.hint: You'll be able to add additional access URLs later from the instance administration page.
redirect.unreachable: Could not retrieve the redirect URI from the API.

savedBanner.label: The client secret is saved and encrypted at rest.

oauth.validating: Validating the client secret with Discord…

secret.label: Client Secret
secret.hint: Encrypted at rest with your master key. Never logged, never displayed in clear.
secret.formatError: The client secret looks too short. Check that you pasted the full value from the Discord portal.

oauth.invalidSecret: Client secret rejected by Discord. Generate a fresh one in the portal (OAuth2 → Reset Secret) and try again.

errors.invalidBody: Client secret missing or too short.
errors.missingAppId: Application ID is not yet stored. Go back to the "Discord App" step.
errors.unreachable: Discord is unreachable. Try again in a moment.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred on the API side.

identity.title: Bot identity
identity.subtitle: Customize the bot's name, avatar and description. This step is optional.
identity.editLater: Editable later in Administration → Bot identity.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.hint: PNG, JPEG or GIF. Max 2 MB. Shown in chat conversations.
avatar.dropPrompt: Drop an image here, or click to browse.
avatar.errorUnsupportedType: Unsupported format. Use a PNG, JPEG or GIF.
avatar.savedLabel: Avatar already saved. Pick a file above to replace it, or leave empty to keep it.

banner.label: Banner (optional)
banner.hint: Wide image shown at the top of the bot's Discord profile. PNG, JPEG or GIF, recommended 5:2 ratio. Max 2 MB.
banner.dropPrompt: Drop a wide image here, or click to browse.
banner.errorUnsupportedType: Unsupported format. Use a PNG, JPEG or GIF.
banner.savedLabel: Banner already saved. Pick a file above to replace it, or leave empty to keep it.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Describe your bot in a few words (400 characters max).

errors.invalidBody: One of the fields does not match the expected format (name 1–32 chars, description 0–400 chars, avatar valid image).
errors.missingBotToken: Bot token is not yet stored. Go back to the "Bot token" step.
errors.missingAppId: Application ID is not yet stored. Go back to the "Discord App" step.
errors.unreachable: Discord is unreachable. Try again in a moment.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred on the API side.

summary.title: Summary and launch
summary.subtitle: Everything is in place. We can connect the bot to Discord and open the dashboard.

checklist.botToken: Bot token validated and encrypted at rest

summary.startNote: Clicking "Start Varde" marks the setup as done and triggers the Discord gateway connection. You'll be redirected to the dashboard once the bot is online (30 s timeout).
summary.timeoutMessage: The setup is saved but the Discord gateway connection didn't finish within the 30 s window. Check the server logs — the bot will reconnect on your next refresh.

errors.missingFields: Some credentials are missing. Go back through the wizard.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred on the API side.

guildPermissions.title: Dashboard permissions
guildPermissions.subtitle: Choose which Discord roles grant access to this server's dashboard. Admins get full access, moderators only see modules tagged as such.

admin.heading: Admins
admin.description: Discord roles with full dashboard access on this server. At least one role required.

moderator.heading: Moderators
moderator.description: Roles with access to moderation-tagged modules only (moderation, anti-spam).

guildPermissions.emptyAdminWarning: At least one admin role is required.
guildPermissions.removeSelfWarning: You are removing a role that grants you access. Confirm?

errors.invalidPermissions: Invalid configuration. Check there are no duplicates and at least one admin role is selected.
errors.unknownRoleIds: Some roles no longer exist on the server.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred on the API side.

shell.banner: Instance administration — host-only area. Changes apply immediately.

discord.title: Discord configuration
discord.subtitle: Discord credentials for this instance — Application ID + Public Key, bot token, OAuth client secret. All changes are validated against Discord before persistence.

app.heading: Discord application
app.description: App ID and Public Key for your Discord application. Editable from the Developer portal.

token.heading: Bot token
token.description: Gateway login token. Masked by default. A rotation triggers a gateway reconnect without restarting the process.

intents.heading: Privileged intents
intents.unknown: Intents not checkable (no token, or Discord unreachable).

token.appMismatchBody: This token belongs to a different Discord application. Confirm rotation to persist the new identity — the servers where the bot was present under the old app will no longer recognise the bot.

oauth.heading: OAuth client secret
oauth.description: Client secret used by Auth.js for the dashboard login. Rotation invalidates active sessions.
oauth.warning: Warning: changing this invalidates every active Auth.js session. Owners will have to sign in again.

errors.invalidBody: Invalid fields. Check the App ID (17-20 digit snowflake) and Public Key (64 hex chars).
errors.invalidToken: Bot token rejected by Discord. Check the value in the Developer portal.
errors.invalidSecret: Client secret rejected by Discord. Check the value in the Developer portal.
errors.appNotFound: No Discord application found for this App ID.
errors.discordUnreachable: Discord is unreachable. Try again in a moment.
errors.missingAppId: App ID missing. Fill in the Discord application first.
errors.appIdMismatch: This token belongs to a different Discord application.
errors.reconnectFailed: Gateway reconnect refused. The token was not persisted.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred on the API side.

identity.title: Bot identity
identity.subtitle: Name, avatar and description displayed by the bot in Discord. Changes apply immediately via PATCH /applications/@me.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.hint: PNG, JPEG or GIF. The file is sent to Discord, then the preview switches to the official CDN URL.
avatar.dropPrompt: Drop an image here, or click to browse.
avatar.errorUnsupportedType: Unsupported format. Use a PNG, JPEG or GIF.

banner.label: Banner
banner.hint: Wide image shown at the top of the bot's Discord profile (click on the bot's name). PNG, JPEG or GIF, recommended 5:2 ratio (e.g. 600×240).
banner.dropPrompt: Drop a wide image here, or click to browse.
banner.errorUnsupportedType: Unsupported format. Use a PNG, JPEG or GIF.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Short tagline shown on the bot's Discord profile.

errors.invalidBody: Invalid fields. Check name length (max 32) and description length (max 400).
errors.missingBotToken: Bot token missing — this instance has no Discord credentials registered yet.
errors.missingAppId: Application ID missing — this instance has no Discord credentials registered yet.
errors.discordUnreachable: Discord is unreachable. Try again in a moment.
errors.rateLimited: Discord is rate-limiting this endpoint. Retry in {seconds}s.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred on the API side.

urls.title: Access URLs
urls.subtitle: Manage the main dashboard URL and the additional ones. Also generates the list of redirect URIs to paste into the Discord OAuth2 portal.

base.heading: Main URL
base.description: Primary address used by your admins to reach the dashboard. When empty, the instance falls back to the environment value (BASE_URL).
base.notSet: (not set — the instance uses the environment value)
base.warning: Warning: changing this affects every bot-generated link and invalidates sessions hosted on other origins.

additional.heading: Additional URLs
additional.description: Extra addresses (LAN, second domain, tunnel) allowed to serve the dashboard. Each entry shows up automatically in the redirect URI list.

redirect.heading: Redirect URIs to configure in Discord
redirect.description: List auto-generated from the main URL and additional URLs. Paste these into the Discord OAuth2 portal → "OAuth2 → Redirects" tab.

errors.invalidBody: Invalid URL. Must be a full http(s) URL.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred on the API side.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.subtitle: List of Discord accounts allowed to reach `/admin/*`. The first user to sign in after setup becomes an owner automatically; further owners must be added explicitly.

list.heading: Instance owners
list.description: Each owner can change the instance configuration and add or remove other owners.

add.heading: Add an owner
add.description: The Discord account must have signed in at least once (or its ID must be reachable by the bot via the Discord API).

errors.invalidBody: Invalid Discord ID. Must be a 17-20 digit snowflake.
errors.userNotFound: No Discord user found for this ID.
errors.lastOwner: Cannot remove the last owner. Add another owner first.
errors.discordUnreachable: Discord is unreachable. Try again in a moment.
errors.network: Network issue. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred on the API side.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Global state of this Varde instance — bot, servers, modules, database.
